title: Format Option Reference
description: Discriminated reference to a product format option. The global canonical shape is still named by `format_kind`; this reference selects one concrete product `format_options[]` entry. `scope: "publisher"` identifies a publisher-declared catalog option by `{ publisher_domain, format_option_id }`. `scope: "product"` identifies a product-local option by `format_option_id`; the enclosing package/product context supplies the namespace.

oneOf.title: Publisher Catalog Format Option Reference
oneOf.description: Selects a publisher-catalog-backed product format option by publisher domain and format option ID.

scope.description: Reference resolves against the named publisher's adagents.json top-level `formats[]` catalog.

publisher_domain.description: Publisher domain where the adagents.json declaring this format option is hosted.

format_option_id.description: Stable format option ID from the publisher's adagents.json top-level `formats[]`, matching a publisher-catalog-backed entry in the target product's `format_options[]`.

oneOf.title: Product-Local Format Option Reference
oneOf.description: Selects a product-local format option by ID within the enclosing package/product context. This branch deliberately forbids `publisher_domain` (`publisher_domain: false` in the schema) because product-local references are namespaced by the enclosing product only; include `scope: "publisher"` when the selector must cross into a publisher catalog.

scope.description: Reference resolves only against the target product's inline `format_options[]`.

format_option_id.description: Stable format option ID from the target product's inline `format_options[]`.
